trivia: The bigger E-Jet plays in mainline territory: 100 seats, real range, and economics that let airlines right-size routes a 737 would fly half empty. JetBlue launched it; the world followed.
A stretched body on a bigger wing with CF34-10s: think of it as the E170's ambitious sibling.
funFacts: Flown by mainline carriers, not just regionals.
The best-selling first-generation E-Jet after the E175.
